option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Task Management App</string> <string name="login_title">Welcome</string> <string name="auth_username_hint">Username</string> <string name="auth_password_hint">Password</string> <string name="auth_action_continue">Continue</string> <string name="auth_switch_to_register">Don\'t have an account? Sign up here.</string> <string name="auth_switch_to_login">Already have an account? Log in here.</string> <string name="auth_title_login">Login</string> <string name="auth_title_register">Register</string> <string name="auth_action_login">Login</string> <string name="auth_action_register">Register</string> <string name="home_title">Home</string> <string name="home_subtitle">You are logged in. This is a placeholder home screen.</string> <string name="home_analytics_title">Weekly Activity Analytics</string> <string name="home_analytics_placeholder">Chart placeholder</string> <string name="home_recent_title">Recent Activities</string> <string name="home_recent_subtitle">All activities</string> <string name="activities_title">All Activities</string> <string name="activities_placeholder">Activity list placeholder</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Task Management App</string> <string name="login_title">Welcome</string> <string name="auth_username_hint">Username</string> <string name="auth_password_hint">Password</string> <string name="auth_action_continue">Continue</string> <string name="auth_switch_to_register">Don\'t have an account? Sign up here.</string> <string name="auth_switch_to_login">Already have an account? Log in here.</string> <string name="auth_title_login">Login</string> <string name="auth_title_register">Register</string> <string name="auth_action_login">Login</string> <string name="auth_action_register">Register</string> <string name="home_title">Home</string> <string name="home_subtitle">You are logged in. option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Task Management App</string> <string name="login_title">Welcome</string> <string name="auth_toggle_login">Login</string> <string name="auth_toggle_register">Register</string> <string name="auth_username_hint">Username</string> <string name="auth_email_hint">Email</string> <string name="auth_action_continue">Continue</string> </resources>
